entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange protocol with current liquidity and active recent swap volume across Base, Fantom, and Arbitrum.
entity.notes: The current first-party Eliteness Network surface remains reachable and provides the E3 exchange identity. DefiLlama reports current TVL across Base, Fantom, and Arbitrum plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Eliteness Network official website
evidence.notes: Current first-party website remains reachable and preserves the E3 exchange identity and product context.

evidence.title: E3 metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry reports current TVL across Base, Fantom, and Arbitrum together with non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: E3 DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies E3 as a multichain decentralized exchange.
